name: Treant Protector
description: Life becomes death becomes new life. As it should be. Rooftrellen, the Treant Protector.

abilities.name: Nature's Guise
abilities.description: Grants bonus movement speed and tree-walking when near trees. Reduces cooldown by a flat amount per hero level.

abilities.name: Nature's Grasp
abilities.description: Creates vines towards the target location. Vines slow down and deal damage to enemy units that walk through.

abilities.name: Leech Seed
abilities.description: A successful attack now deals spell damage bonus and binds the enemy unit. The heal component is less effective on allied creeps.

abilities.name: Living Armor
abilities.description: Applies a buff that negates all damage types from all player-controlled sources. The damage negation value reduces per damage instance negated, and removes the buff entirely once the damage negated value reaches nil. The roots and tendrils of the Treant Protectors are far-reaching, stimulating the growth and rejuvenation of all of nature.

abilities.name: Eyes In The Forest
abilities.description: Enchants a tree, which grants Treant unobstructed vision in that location.

abilities.name: Overgrowth
abilities.description: Deals damage per second and binds all debuff-affected enemy units within the radius. Grants Treant phase movement, becomes unslowable with a fixed movement speed for the duration. Additionally grants self bonus strength and a splash attack. Reduces cooldown.
